headline: Sentiment down 43% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 119% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 106 quotes and 91 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.
• Despite the high volume, frustration levels are declining from yesterday's peak and remain well below the recent high of 153.7.
• Optimism crashed significantly from yesterday (-1.3 to -24.6), hitting one of its lowest points in the 47-day period.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
